testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.descripcion: Employers and domestic workers across Latin America are already formalizing their work relationships with Homely.

items.name: Claudia Méndez
items.text: I used to manage everything in a WhatsApp group and there were always misunderstandings. With Homely, my worker and I see exactly the same thing. Zero conflicts since we started.

items.name: Rosa Hernández
items.text: When I emigrated to Spain, I brought my Homely profile and my new employer could see all my verified years of work. For the first time, my experience meant something in another country.

items.name: Andrés Villalobos
items.text: The financial dashboard gives me a clear view of everything I pay monthly. The PDF reports are perfect for my accounting. A tool that should have existed years ago.

items.name: Carmen Jiménez
items.text: My benefits were always just in my employer's head. Now I see them in real time on my phone. Homely gave me the security I never had in this job.
